title: Vitax Vitafeed Multipurpose Feed Soluble Fertiliser,
features: Contains equal proportions of nitrogen, potash and phosphate plus essential trace elements
Suitable for seedlings and young plants
Easy to mix water soluble powder
description: Product Description An effective all-year-round feed that contains equal proportions of nitrogen, phosphate and potash together with essential trace elements. It will promote strong, healthy growth in bedding plants, vegetables, fruit, trees and shrubs. It is also suitable for use with seedlings, young plants and can be used for hanging baskets, tubs and lawns. Dilute in water as per instructions and apply via watering can or hose end dilutor. Directions Dilute in water as per instructions and apply via watering can or hose end dilutor. Safety Warning Always dilute before use. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. If ingested, seek medical advice immediately. Store in a cool, dry place away from heat and direct sunlight. Do not use on plants intended for human consumption without proper certification. Box Contains 1 x Vitafeed 111 Soluble Balanced Feed 500g See more
